about.heading: Creating experiences that matter
about.bio_1: UI/UX Designer focused on creating digital experiences that unite aesthetics and functionality.
about.bio_2: With expertise in Figma, prototyping and design systems, I transform complex challenges into intuitive and memorable interfaces.
about.bio_3: Passionate about motion design and new technologies, always seeking the intersection between art and technology.
